name: Process Flow — Systematic Review PRISMA Process
input: Show the systematic review process as a step-by-step flow: Define Research Question, Develop Search Strategy, Search Databases, Remove Duplicates, Screen Titles/Abstracts, Full-Text Review, Data Extraction, Quality Assessment, Synthesize Results.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Research Question, Search Strategy, Search Databases, Duplicates, Screen, Full-Text, Extraction, Quality, Synthesize)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Arrows between steps showing sequential flow
napkinBenchmark: Horizontal or vertical process flow with 9 numbered steps, each as a card with an icon and brief description. Arrows connect each step to the next.

data.title: Systematic Review Process

items.label: Develop Search Strategy
items.description: Create Boolean search strings with MeSH terms

items.label: Search Databases
items.description: Query PubMed, Embase, Cochrane, and grey literature

items.label: Screen Titles/Abstracts
items.description: Two independent reviewers apply inclusion criteria

items.label: Full-Text Review
items.description: Retrieve and assess full articles for eligibility

items.label: Data Extraction
items.description: Extract study characteristics and outcomes into forms

items.label: Quality Assessment
items.description: Apply risk of bias tool (e.g., Newcastle-Ottawa)

data.caption: Step-by-step systematic review workflow following PRISMA guidelines
